headline: Prediction Market Ban? Senator Brings Legislation Forward, Another Congressman Invests In Polymarket Backer
summary: A senator wants to see changes made to prediction markets. Another member of Congress invested in one of the biggest public backers of prediction markets.

headline: NYSE Content Update: Georgia Gov. Kemp + Atlanta Mayor Dickens to Ring Bell Ahead of World Cup
summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Access today's NYSE Pre-market update for market insights before trading begins.

headline: Iran war prediction market bets draw heat: 'Insane this is legal'
summary: Wagers were placed over the weekend about the fate of Iranian leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed in the bombardment.
